title: TimeseriesData
content:
# TimeseriesData


## Properties

- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the `last_value` values were first created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **data_type** (`string`): Primitive data type of the `last_value` values.
- **fields** (`array`): Data `field` element name of each value in `last_value`.
- **last_timestamp** (`string`): UTC time when the time series data was last accessed, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **last_value** (`any`): Value represented in one of these formats.
- **resource** (`string`): Asset / Data Stream associated with `last_value`.
- **source** (`string`): Specifies the user or workload source for `last_value`.
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when the time series data was last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
summary: Object with properties: created, data_type, fields, last_timestamp, last_value

created.description: UTC time when the `last_value` values were first created, formatted in RFC 3339.

data_type.description: Primitive data type of the `last_value` values.

updated.description: UTC time when the time series data was last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
